feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

ITS ACTUALLY THE ONLY PROTEST THAT DID WORK, IT DID STOP ACTA. Do you really fucking want to give your ID on every fucking god forsaken internet forum or simply a website where you can comment something????? Matter of the fact, there WONT be forums its all gonna be shut down because nobody will be able to afford these stupid fi

entry.title: /int/ International: I can't be around them. I just can't. Every interaction with human being brings …
entry.content: I can't be around them. I just can't. Every interaction with human being brings me pain. They crave to hurt me, to damage me. They are usually subtle about it. But in they nature they well aware of what they are doing. I can't be around them. I can't be around others. I can only isolate myself. I will isolate myself when I am free and with money.

entry.title: /int/ International: I really don't get this AC meme. I have it at home, and they sell units in store…
entry.content: I really don't get this AC meme. I have it at home, and they sell units in stores with no problem. Getting an AC unit with an outdoor vent may involve some bureaucracy if it's for an apartment in the city, but it's not off-limits. Almost every office building or public building I've been to has some sort of AC.

This shit is insufferable, I had a very hard time sitting through the first episode and it's just 10 minutes long. Are /co/ slop pigs just that bu

entry.title: /news/ News: Woman trafficked by Epstein and raped by trump, lives in fear of retaliation, relative says
entry.content: Trump administration faces an escalating controversy over handling of ‘Jane Doe 4’ documents in Epstein files. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news /2026/jun/30/alleged-epstein-victim -trump-accuser A woman known as Jane Doe 4 in the Jeffrey Epstein files is “staying off the grid” and lives in fear of retaliation from the Trump administration amid an escalating controversy over its handling of her case, according to a family member. “Trauma is brutal. Chronic trauma destroys,” said the relative,

entry.title: /g/ Technology: AI Censorship Says Too Much
entry.content: Apparently a full clothed women looking angry is erotic? I think this tells me too much about Google staff. Is Larry Page a sub desperate to be spoken down to by dominate women? Is he the... anti-alpha?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why aren't people using so-called "AI" to sort their terabytes worth of pornogra…
entry.content: Why aren't people using so-called "AI" to sort their terabytes worth of pornography if that's what they predominantly use it for? You would think that this would be the best tool to automatically tag images as a whole in Windows, and sort them into categorical folders for respective attributes. So how come the only things "AI" seems to be good for is mass surveillance and generating 1girl images when it's pattern recognition abilities could be used for much more democratic purposes too?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why is driving and parking so fucked in Australia
entry.content: Why is driving and parking so fucked in Australia

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I've become jaded about PC gaming.
entry.content: Real (Fake and gay) talk, PC gaming has made me miserable. You'd think having access to Steam and top tier emulation would be better yet somehow it's not. Back when I had a console, I had a few games and stuck to them. Now I have every game under the sun from the last half century, yet still only 24 hours in the day. And 80% of my time on the PC is not gaming! It's doing everything but. And half the games require babysitting to work properly. Back when I had consoles. It all just worked for me.

entry.content: does your chosen brand have a signature color

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Windows 7 [Home Thread]
entry.content: >>109163729 Honestly, I hate MS for killing this beautiful simple OS. It was stable without constant updoots and online crap (unlike Troondows 10 and 11), backwards-compatible (unlike Shitux and macOS) and skeuomorphic with transparent glass, which makes it still a pleasure to look at after all those years, especially compared to today's stale corporate GUI. Honestly, what more did you need? and what more do you still need that WIN32 API (home32 API as I'd like to call it) can't provide?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I had the meeting on Monday about my "would you rather rape your mum or get rape…
entry.content: I had the meeting on Monday about my "would you rather rape your mum or get raped by your dad" question at after work drinks. HR and boss. >Hey anon, we've got reports that you verbally assaulted Sally on Thursday night Yes. "Verbally assaulted" is what they said. >I made a comment whilst intoxicated. It was an inappropriate comment. I don't normally drink, I felt pressured to drink. >Pressured? >Yes, everyone was drinking and told me it was work drinks >So you thought it was a work-sanctioned e

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: MBTI is fake and gay. You must submit to PASF or be eternally damned
entry.content: https://pasf.org/ 64 personality types. Neutral questions that are much harder to manipulate toward a desired result. The fucking thing generates an early life section, a more MBTI-type thing about your interests and habits, tells you how your childhood fucked you up and how you compensate for that, and a section about how to manipulate you into doing things. Each personality aspect is graded out of 20, so that makes it even more fine-tuned. Glowies use it for recruitment and shit. You will feel

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Price My Beater
entry.content: 2007 Jetta (Wolfsburg) >Radiator's shot, cooling line leaks >Body damage from low-speed front-end collision >Few other dings and scrapes >Headliner loose and hangs from ceiling/moonroof >Probably has some mold/water damage >Still turns over >Still brakes >Still turns left and right >Doesn't overheat for the first ~25 miles (afraid to go any farther than that without letting the engine cool down a bit) I should have sold it before it got this bad but our ridiculous registration and insurance laws

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is this the worst remake ever made?
entry.content: Sure, there are probably worse remakes on a technical level, but it almost seems like Bluepoint went out if their usually to not preserve the original vision of the game >hud looks like a cheap mobile game hud >menu is changed to look like a modern WRPG menu >totally neutered the soundtrack to be "epic and "cinematic" I'm glad bluepoint is dead

entry.content: Games is getting too expensive PC/Hardware to run Games is getting too expensive Electricity to power my PC is getting too expensive Water to hydrate my body is getting too expensive Food to power my belly is getting too expensive Only Internet price stay the same Is this really it for us ?? entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why won't Gabe just bow out and accept that EGS is the superior product?
entry.content: >Tim: "The Epic Games infrastructure has a superpower that Steam and others—Xbox, PlayStation, Switch—don't have, which is that all of our players can talk to each other across all platforms when you're in any of our products on any of those platforms. So you can have a PC player on our launcher together with a console player who's in Fortnite, together with a mobile player who's got the Epic Games app installed—we have an app that's like the Steamworks app for PC, for mobile devices—and it's a

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: My friend thinks he's chopped and all, but I have a kink for evil, powerful, and…
entry.content: My friend thinks he's chopped and all, but I have a kink for evil, powerful, and stereotypically Jewish men like Alex Karp. I've been watching his interviews recently, and the way he acts really awakens something in me as a neurodivergent trans woman. He acts so naturally, doesn't try to hide his neurodivergent side, and I loveee seeing how excited he gets while explaining a topic that's interesting to him. The way he shakes his feet while listening to another person just so he doesn't lose atte

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Light mode vs Dark mode
entry.content: What is your opinion on light vs dark mode and how do you use them? Personally I went from dark mode all the time to dark mode only when it gets dark outside to always light mode. Now I can't stand dark mode at all and regard it as an eye sore. How did dark mode become so common in the first place?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >Fails your MOT despite braking functionality being perfectly fine, costing you …
entry.content: >Fails your MOT despite braking functionality being perfectly fine, costing you either a moderate amount of money + days worth of labor in the driveway, or just lots of money if you're a wrenchlet (integrated wheel bearings) How do you respond without sounding mad? New disks, regardless of whether premium coated ones or not, are gonna look exactly the same way in <4 years when you live somewhere with salty winter roads btw

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >>24588018
/g/ Technology: "Privacy" on untrusted host
entry.content: Picrel is my current setup, I guess that's fine for most people: ""a little more"" anonymous browsing, geoblocks and torrents. But now that I think about it, this setup is fundamentally flawed, not only is windows able to see my real IP + the VPN IP, it can also see all the domains I'm connecting to, while having my email, HWID and geolocation. >router with VPN capabilities My OS already knows who I am. >reinstall? Doesn't matter, I need new Hardware, because my MOBO HWID is brandmarked. Every t

entry.content: Can we get a thread about the greatest and most revolutionary sports car nameplate of all time, the Ford Mustang? the car that created an entire automotive genre that others seek to imitate. Discuss mustangs, discuss your personal experience with mustangs, discuss rare mustangs, if you own a mustang, post and tell us what it's like to own. I want a classic /o/ thread from the old days. no bait, just talking about an iconic vehicle amongst like minded enthusiast. since this board is slow, this sh

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Guys I'm not gonna lie, I'm about to watch some Jim Carrey moviefilms. All I hum…
entry.content: Guys I'm not gonna lie, I'm about to watch some Jim Carrey moviefilms. All I humbly ask you is in your opinion belief or other such though, who would win in a cage fight? Me, Michelangelo, James Tiberius Kirk, Michelangelo the ninja mutant turtle, your mother, or an oxford comma? I hope this message finds you well, sent from my Ifridge.
